get.description: Returns a paginated, filtered list of articles

post.description: Create a new article (requires articles.create permission)

get.description: Returns a single article by its URL slug (public)
Returns a single article by its ID

put.description: Update an existing article (requires articles.edit permission)

post.description: Authenticate with username/email and password, returns JWT token pair

get.description: Returns the authenticated user profile and permissions

put.description: Update display_name, bio, website, avatar of current user

post.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new token pair
Create a new user account and return JWT token pair

get.description: Returns all user-defined content types with field definitions

post.description: Create a new content type with field definitions

get.description: Returns a content type with its field definitions

delete.description: Deletes a content type and all its entries

get.description: Returns paginated entries of a content type

post.description: Create a new entry for a content type

get.description: Returns a single entry by document ID

delete.description: Delete an entry by document ID

post.description: Revert a published entry to draft

get.description: Returns service health status (public, no auth required)
Returns system information (version, uptime, Go version, etc.)

post.description: Creates a new API token with specified permissions

delete.description: Deletes an API token by ID

get.description: Returns delivery logs for a webhook

valid.description: Valid is true if Time is not NULL

field_type.description: text, rich_text, integer, float, boolean, date, media, relation, json, enum, email, url

expires_at.description: RFC3339 or empty for no expiry
